title: Property Consultant - Liases Foras - Multiple Openings

jsonLd.title: Property Consultant - Liases Foras - Multiple Openings
jsonLd.description:
Liases Foras, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Property Consultant for our Indore operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About Liases Foras:
Liases Foras is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Negotiate pricing, terms, and conditions on behalf of clients
• Liaise with banks and NBFCs for home loan assistance to customers
• Provide advisory services on property investment and market trends
• Build relationships with channel partners and brokers
• Coordinate with legal teams for documentation and title verification
• Prepare presentations and proposals for institutional clients
• Coordinate with architects, contractors, and project teams

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Arch / M.Arch from recognized institution
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Contract Management
• Proficiency in Portfolio Management
• Proficiency in Client Relationship Management
• Proficiency in GIS Tools
• Proficiency in Financial Modeling
• Proficiency in MS Office
• Proficiency in Title Search
• Proficiency in AutoCAD

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Referral bonus program
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Life and accident insurance
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Indore, Madhya Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Liases Foras!
